steps.t: The picnic basket is beside Rosalinda North-took in Long Cleeve. Rosalinda has asked you to bring a picnic basket to her mother Meregrot.
Meregrot is sitting by the river, south-east of Long Cleeve. Rosalinda has asked you to bring a basket of food to her mother, Meregrot.
Meregrot is sitting by the river, south-east of Long Cleeve. Meregrot North-took has asked you to place the picnic basket on the blanket beside her.
